title: SingleStore Workspace
description: Schema representing a SingleStore Helios workspace, which provides compute capacity for running SQL queries against the SingleStore database engine. Workspaces belong to a workspace group and can be independently suspended and resumed.

workspaceID.description: Unique identifier of the workspace assigned by SingleStore Helios.

workspaceGroupID.description: Unique identifier of the workspace group this workspace belongs to.

state.description: Current lifecycle state of the workspace, reflecting its operational status.

size.description: Workspace size designation controlling the allocated vCPUs and memory (e.g., S-00, S-1, S-2, S-4).

endpoint.description: Hostname used for establishing database connections to this workspace.

cacheConfig.description: Cache multiplier applied to the workspace. Higher values increase the in-memory cache for frequently accessed data.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workspace was created.

expiresAt.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp after which the workspace is automatically terminated.

AutoSuspendConfig.description: Configuration controlling automatic suspension of a workspace after a period of inactivity to reduce compute costs.

suspended.description: When true, auto-suspend is enabled and the workspace will be suspended after the specified idle interval.

suspendAfterSeconds.description: Number of seconds of query inactivity after which the workspace is automatically suspended.

WorkspaceGroup.description: A logical container grouping workspaces sharing a common cloud region, network configuration, and firewall rules.

workspaceGroupID.description: Unique identifier of the workspace group.

name.description: Human-readable name of the workspace group.

state.description: Current lifecycle state of the workspace group.

regionID.description: Identifier of the cloud provider region where the workspace group is deployed.

firewallRanges.description: List of CIDR IP address ranges permitted to connect to workspaces in this group.

allowAllTraffic.description: When true, all inbound traffic is allowed regardless of the firewallRanges configuration.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workspace group was created.

expiresAt.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp after which the workspace group is automatically terminated.

Region.description: A cloud provider region that supports workspace group creation within SingleStore Helios.

regionID.description: Unique identifier string for the region used in Management API requests.

region.description: Cloud provider region code such as us-east-1 for AWS or us-central1 for GCP.

country.description: Country where the cloud region is physically located.

Organization.description: The top-level account entity within SingleStore Helios, grouping users, workspace groups, and billing.

orgID.description: Unique identifier of the SingleStore Helios organization.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the organization was created.

Job.description: A scheduled notebook job that executes a specified notebook on a configurable schedule against a target workspace.

description.description: Optional description of the job purpose.

completedExecutionsCount.description: Total number of executions that have completed for this job.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job was created.

terminatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job was terminated, if applicable.

JobSchedule.description: Schedule configuration defining when and how often a job executes.

mode.description: Scheduling mode. Once runs the notebook a single time; Recurring executes on a repeating interval.

startAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when the job should first execute.

executionIntervalInMinutes.description: Number of minutes between recurring executions. Required when mode is Recurring.

JobExecutionConfig.description: Configuration specifying the notebook and runtime environment for job execution.

notebookPath.description: Path to the notebook file in SingleStore Spaces to execute.

runtimeName.description: Name of the runtime environment for notebook execution.

createSnapshot.description: When true, saves a snapshot of the executed notebook with outputs after each run.

JobTargetConfig.description: Configuration specifying the workspace and database the job should connect to.

targetID.description: Unique identifier of the workspace to connect to during execution.

targetType.description: Type of target resource. Currently only Workspace is supported.

databaseName.description: Name of the database within the workspace to connect to.

resumeTarget.description: When true, automatically resumes a suspended workspace before execution.

Secret.description: An organization-level secret storing sensitive values that can be referenced securely in notebooks and jobs.

name.description: Human-readable name used to reference the secret in notebooks and jobs.

createdBy.description: Identifier of the user who created the secret.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the secret was created.

lastUpdatedBy.description: Identifier of the user who last updated the secret.

lastUpdatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the secret was last modified.
